destinations.evidence: New async metadata is constructed in AwaitingExecution with no result or proof fields populated, and the enum has no PreCommit state.
destinations.snippet:
pub enum AsyncState { AwaitingExecution, Fulfilled, AwaitingDelivery, DeliveryReady }
...
state: AsyncState::AwaitingExecution,
execution_result: None,
execution_proof: None,
delivery_result: None,
delivery_proof: None,
zk_proof: None,

destinations.evidence: Canonical async commitment ingestion always creates the entry through the awaiting_execution constructor.
destinations.snippet: self.add_metadata(AsyncTxMetadata::awaiting_execution(original_tx, original_sender, Some(commitment_tx), precompile_address, precompile_input, commit_block, contract_expiry_block))

equivalence_argument: The v2.2 port tracks newly committed async originals through AsyncTxMetadata::awaiting_execution. That constructor is the only add_committed_async_tx path and initializes the lifecycle to AwaitingExecution with all result/proof fields empty; PreCommit is absent from the current state enum.
rationale: The primary diff removes AsyncState::PreCommit, adds AsyncState::Fulfilled, documents AwaitingExecution as the state after canonical inclusion while waiting for executor output, and initializes new metadata to AwaitingExecution with execution_result and execution_proof set to None. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: The enum variants and initial state may be internal lifecycle bookkeeping, and the TODO comments indicate parts of metadata extraction were not yet fully implemented in this commit.
statement: A newly added async-exec pool entry must begin in AwaitingExecution state with no execution_result and no execution_proof, and the pool lifecycle must represent completion with Fulfilled rather than a PreCommit state.
suggested_falsification_tests: Add a system async-exec transaction to AsyncExecPool, inspect the stored AsyncTxMeta, and assert state is AwaitingExecution, execution_result is None, execution_proof is None, and no PreCommit state is reachable for newly added entries.
summary: New async pool entries start AwaitingExecution with empty result/proof fields.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Add a system async-exec transaction to AsyncExecPool, inspect the stored AsyncTxMeta, and assert state is AwaitingExecution, execution_result is None, execution_proof is None, and no PreCommit state is reachable for newly added entries.
title: New async pool entries await fulfillment
